case_title: JAMES ALLEN STEWART, JR. VS. A T & T CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT A T & T CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. PLAINTIFF JAMES ALLEN STEWART JR. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AT & T CORPORATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TERRI KNIGHT, NETWORK MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEWART JR, JAMES ALLEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEWART JR, JAMES ALLEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT A T & T CORPORATION THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT PLAINTIFF'S INJURY (IF ANY) WAS CAUSED BY AN ACT OR OMISSION OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
FILED NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OR OTHER CONTACT INFORMATION. DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS UPDATED THIS DATE. FILED BY DEFENDANT A T & T CORPORATION AS TO PLAINTIFF STEWART JR, JAMES ALLEN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY STEWART JR, JAMES ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT A T & T CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
